item.title: Version 1.9.5
item.description:
What's New in 1.9.5

Parametric Review Tracking Sheets

  • Randomized Tracking Calendars: Introduced fully randomized, configurable tracking sheets that match your physical printed schedule layouts.
  • Flexible Generation Configurations: Added a setup panel allowing users to configure custom parameters for Total Days, Class Ranges per row, Subject Ranges per row, and Student counts.
  • Intelligent Scheduling Toggles: Integrated optional support for Union ("Any Subject") vs. Intersection ("Common Subjects Only") and a "Strict Deduplication" filter to prevent back-to-back repeats of classrooms, subjects, and students.

Interactive Spreadsheet & Data Grid

  • TigleDataGrid Molecule: Engineered a generic, highly reusable, responsive spreadsheet layout component that dynamically stretches to fill wide desktop screens while preserving scroll bounds on smaller resolutions.
  • Pill-Shaped Cohort Lists: Student roll selections are parsed dynamically to render as elegant, color-coded visual pills instead of raw comma-separated lists.
  • Vertical Multi-Class Alignment: Handled multi-class days by stacking class rows vertically with thin, subtle grid dividers to align classrooms directly with their randomized student pools.

Checklist Interactivity & Autosaving

  • Three-State Cycling Status: The ✓ or ✕ verification column now cycles dynamically on click (unmarked -> ✓ Met -> ✕ Action Needed -> unmarked) with soft green and red visual highlight indicators.
  • Seamless Remarks Modal: Tapping the remarks column launches a localized editor sheet, preventing layout overflow bugs and popping safely without interrupting the primary grid detail view.
  • Background Persistence: Any edits to checkboxes or remarks automatically write and save to the local Isar database instantly with zero lag.

Student Directory & Mandatory Roll Numbers

  • Required Class Roll Numbers: Added a mandatory, indexed rollNo field inside the student collection schema.
  • Validation Safety: Updated the student admission form to enforce unique roll numbers within the target classroom, preventing data entry errors.
  • Index Optimization: Fixed a critical database schema issue by migrating optional ID and Admission number fields to standard indexes, completely resolving multiple-null unique index violations.

Onboarding Utilities & Demo Data Generator

  • Settings Utility Center: Integrated a "Developer & Onboarding Utilities" panel inside Settings.
  • Wipe vs. Append Modes: Supports both a destructive "Fresh Reset & Load" database wipe and a non-destructive "Merge & Append" to easily populate demo structures.
  • Dynamic Active Year Mapping: Generated datasets dynamically bind to the user's current system year, ensuring academic plans and scrollers are immediately marked **Active** instead of "Upcoming" or "Dates TBA".

Performance & Database Layer Stability

  • Async Transaction Separation: Refactored Isar link saving to run inside a separate, independent write transaction block after the main transaction closes, entirely resolving nesting conflicts (IsarError: Isar does not support nesting transactions).
